channel.title: Posts on Rudy Susanto
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Rudy Susanto

item.title: Hugo: Quick and Easy Setup
item.description: We will start this tutorial with a TL;DR section to get a simple Hugo project up and running, followed by the remaining sections to describe it. TL;DR These are a few CLI commands which I summarize from the official Hugo documentation page to get a simple Hugo project up and running. # Install Hugo static site generator brew install hugo # Create a new project hugo new site homepage cd homepage git init # Download and select preferred theme git submodule add https://github.
